input:
(define (ok? v) (> v 10))
        (match {:id 5}
          ({:id n} when (ok? n) "big")
          ({:id n :name s} "has-name")
          ({:id n} (+ n 100))
          (_ 0))

(begin
          (define c 0)
          (define (tick) (set! c (+ c 1)) #t)
          (match '(1 2)
            ([a b d] when (tick) :bad)
            (_ c)))

(match {:x 5}
          ({:x n} when (> n 10) :big)
          ({:x n} when (> n 0) :pos)
          (_ :no))

(begin
          (defmulti area (fn (shape) (get shape :type)))
          (defmethod area :circle (fn (s) (* 3 (get s :radius) (get s :radius))))
          (defmethod area :rect (fn (s) (* (get s :width) (get s :height))))
          (area {:type :circle :radius 5}))

(begin
          (defmulti area (fn (shape) (get shape :type)))
          (defmethod area :circle (fn (s) (* 3 (get s :radius) (get s :radius))))
          (defmethod area :rect (fn (s) (* (get s :width) (get s :height))))
          (area {:type :rect :width 4 :height 6}))

(begin
          (defmulti combine (fn (a b) (list (type a) (type b))))
          (defmethod combine '(:int :int) (fn (a b) (+ a b)))
          (defmethod combine '(:string :string) (fn (a b) (string-append a b)))
          (list (combine 1 2) (combine "a" "b")))

(begin
          (defmulti op (fn (x) (get x :kind)))
          (defmethod op :add (fn (x) (+ (get x :a) (get x :b))))
          (let ((r1 (op {:kind :add :a 1 :b 2})))
            (defmethod op :mul (fn (x) (* (get x :a) (get x :b))))
            (+ r1 (op {:kind :mul :a 3 :b 4}))))

(begin
          (defmulti fizzbuzz (fn (n) (cond ((= (modulo n 15) 0) :fizzbuzz)
                                           ((= (modulo n 3) 0) :fizz)
                                           ((= (modulo n 5) 0) :buzz)
                                           (#t :num))))
          (defmethod fizzbuzz :fizzbuzz (fn (n) "FizzBuzz"))
          (defmethod fizzbuzz :fizz (fn (n) "Fizz"))
          (defmethod fizzbuzz :buzz (fn (n) "Buzz"))
          (defmethod fizzbuzz :num (fn (n) n))
          (list (fizzbuzz 15) (fizzbuzz 9) (fizzbuzz 10) (fizzbuzz 7)))

(begin
          (defmacro my-do (. body)
            `(let ((r# nil)) ,@body r#))
          (my-do (define x 1) (define y 2)))

(begin
          (defmacro multi (a b c d)
            `(let ((w# ,a) (x# ,b) (y# ,c) (z# ,d))
               (+ w# x# y# z#)))
          (multi 1 2 3 4))
(let ((c 0)) (foldl (fn (acc x) (set! c (+ c x)) acc) 0 (list 1 2 3)) c)

(begin
        (define (outer n)
          (define (even? x) (if (= x 0) #t (odd? (- x 1))))
          (define (odd? x) (if (= x 0) #f (even? (- x 1))))
          (even? n))
        (outer 10))

(begin
        (define (outer x)
          (define scale 10)
          (define (helper y) (* y scale))
          (helper x))
        (outer 5))

(begin
        (define (solve n)
          (define (try-it x) (if (ok? x) x 0))
          (define (ok? x) (> x 0))
          (try-it n))
        (solve 5))

(begin
        (define (outer n)
          (define (inc x) (+ x step))
          (define step 3)
          (inc n))
        (outer 10))
(let loop ((n 10) (acc 0)) (if (= n 0) acc (loop (- n 1) (+ acc n))))
(begin (defmacro my-if (c t e) (list 'if c t e)) (macroexpand '(my-if #t 1 2)))
(begin (defmacro my-if (c t e) (list 'if c t e)) (my-if #t 1 2))
(begin (define (even? n) (if (= n 0) #t (odd? (- n 1)))) (define (odd? n) (if (= n 0) #f (even? (- n 1)))) (even? 1000))
(begin (define t 0) (do ((i 0 (begin (set! t (+ t 1)) (+ i 1)))) ((= i 3) t)))
(begin (define acc '()) (do ((i 0 (+ i 1))) ((= i 3) (reverse acc)) (set! acc (cons i acc))))
(begin (define a 0) (define b 0) (while (< a 3) (set! a (+ a 1)) (set! b (+ b 10))) b)
(begin (define total 0) (define i 0) (while (< i 3) (define j 0) (while (< j 3) (set! total (+ total 1)) (set! j (+ j 1))) (set! i (+ i 1))) total)

(begin
    (define (make-shared)
      (define n 0)
      (define inc (lambda () (set! n (+ n 1))))
      (define get (lambda () n))
      (list inc get))
    (define p (make-shared))
    ((first p))
    ((first p))
    ((car (cdr p))))

(begin
    (define escaped #f)
    (try
      (begin
        (define x 0)
        (set! escaped (lambda () x))
        (set! x 99)
        (throw "boom"))
      (catch e (escaped))))

(begin
    (define (test)
      (define n 0)
      (define inc (lambda (x) (set! n (+ n 1)) n))
      (map inc (list 1 2 3)))
    (test))
(begin (define-record-type point (make-point x y) point? (x point-x) (y point-y)) (point-x (make-point 3 4)))
(begin (define-record-type point (make-point x y) point? (x point-x) (y point-y)) (point? (make-point 1 2)))
(begin (define-record-type point (make-point x y) point? (x point-x) (y point-y)) (point? 42))
(begin (define-record-type point (make-point x y) point? (x point-x) (y point-y)) (equal? (make-point 1 2) (make-point 1 2)))
